title: Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple Recipe
description: Craft Enchanted Golden Apple just like back in the days!!!!
body:
# Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple

**Forge Your Own Forbidden Fruit**

Sick of scouring ancient ruins or praying for dungeon loot just to snag one Enchanted Golden Apple? Same. This datapack rewrites the rules and hands you the power to craft Minecraft’s most mythical snack — no RNG required.

Note: “Enchanted Apple Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If you are interested im more Datapcks check out the links at the end of the description

**🧠 Why It’s Better**: 
Because legendary items shouldn’t be locked behind luck. Whether you're braving hardcore mode, prepping for a dragon fight, or just flexing in full netherite, this pack gives you the edge without breaking balance. Downloading this as datapack is beneficial as you dont need to worry about downloading for a specific mod loader and it is compatible with the JEI mod.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip
 
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Start crafting your golden glory

**Get the Recipe from the gallery**

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Try out some more datapacks if you wish:**                      
 
[Craftable Totem Of Undying Recipe](https://modrinth.com/datapack/totembygreen)
